channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Get ahead of Prime Day with the best TechRadar-tested audio kit of June 2026 — know the products now; snap up deals later
item.description: With not long to go till Amazon Prime Day, here's my pick of the recent portable audio kit you should look out for when the big day(s) arrive

item.title: Best EOFY 2026 iPhone deals: save up to 45% outright or on a plan
item.description: Australia’s end-of-financial-year sales are a good time to pick up a new iPhone for less if you’re in the market for an upgrade, whether through a telco plan or outright.

item.title: Top Lucid Motors executive departs amid new CEO’s leadership shakeup
item.description: The exec, Emad Dlala, has left just a few months after being promoted to SVP of engineering and digital, TechCrunch has learned.

item.title: I'm a big Screen Time user — and Apple's shiny new iOS 27 features won't matter without a major bug fix
item.description: The new features are great, if it's harder to override them
